phase: B9 Schema standardization and compatibility / B10 operational feedback

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map component/relation/signature fields by stable camelCase names; new axes must be added with metricStatus boundary metadata.
newRequiredAssumptions: New required axes must declare measuredZero/measuredNonzero/unmeasured/outOfScope semantics.
coverageExactnessBoundary: metricStatus is the compatibility boundary for coverage and exactness of Sig0 axes.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map ids, relation refs, evidence refs, claims, coverage layers, and theorem-package refs explicitly; never infer a formal claim from renamed fields.
newRequiredAssumptions: New required theorem, coverage, projection, or exactness assumptions must be listed in claims or coverage layers.
coverageExactnessBoundary: AIR coverage layers and claim classifications are the exactness boundary for report generation.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map review summary, witness, theorem precondition, coverage gap, repair suggestion, and non-conclusion fields separately.
newRequiredAssumptions: New required review assumptions must appear in discharged/undischarged assumptions or theorem precondition checks.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Coverage gaps, runtime summary, semantic summary, and non-conclusions delimit report exactness.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map witness id, layer, kind, extension role, classification, evidence, theorem refs, claim classification, measurement boundary, and non-conclusions independently.
newRequiredAssumptions: New witness kinds must declare layer, evidence requirements, measurement boundary, and non-conclusions.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Witness measurement boundary and claim classification distinguish measured evidence from formal theorem claims.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map stable grouping keys, aggregation window, source, metric, status, suppression, repair, witness, claim, and non-conclusion fields separately.
newRequiredAssumptions: New batch metrics must declare grouping key, aggregation window, measurement boundary, and evidence refs.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Ledger status and suppression metadata are operational state, not formal proof state.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map axis id, layer, value type, measurement boundary, evidence requirements, theorem refs, and non-conclusions explicitly.
newRequiredAssumptions: New reported axes must declare whether unmeasured differs from measured zero.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Axis coverage and exactness metadata delimit what a zero or nonzero value can support.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map aggregation window, source report refs, retention policy, outcome metric summaries, missing/private/unmeasured boundaries, and non-conclusions separately.
newRequiredAssumptions: New daily batch metrics must preserve source report refs, retention policy, and missing/private/unmeasured boundary counts.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Missing, private, unavailable, and unmeasured outcome data delimit the operational feedback exactness boundary.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map report finding refs, witness refs, reviewer decision, outcome refs, confidence, missing evidence, calibration input, and non-conclusions separately.
newRequiredAssumptions: New calibration fields must preserve missing / private evidence boundaries and formal-claim non-conclusions.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Reviewer decision, confidence, missing evidence, and calibration input delimit empirical policy tuning exactness.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map team scope, effective period, per-axis thresholds, CI modes, calibration sources, rollback policy, and non-conclusions separately.
newRequiredAssumptions: New threshold axes must preserve warn / fail / advisory mode and calibration source refs.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Team-local threshold policy and calibration source boundaries delimit empirical policy tuning exactness.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map source refs, ownership scopes, boundary erosion signals, missing evidence, and non-conclusions separately.
newRequiredAssumptions: New ownership or boundary erosion metrics must preserve measurement boundary and missing / private evidence refs.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Ownership scope and boundary erosion signal metadata delimit empirical monitoring exactness.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

compatibilityBoundary.fieldMappingPolicy: Map suggestion refs, adopted / rejected / deferred decision, follow-up outcomes, side-effect notes, missing evidence, and non-conclusions separately.
newRequiredAssumptions: New adoption fields must preserve repair suggestion traceability, workflow state, side effects, and missing / private evidence boundaries.
coverageExactnessBoundary: Repair adoption workflow state and follow-up outcome refs delimit empirical repair tracking exactness.
nonConclusions: field mapping does not prove semantic preservation
missing coverage is not measured zero
renamed fields do not discharge new required assumptions

dimensions.checkerBoundary: A checker may validate declared field mappings, but it must not infer semantic equivalence.
Deprecated fields remain compatibility metadata until removal; migration must preserve explicit reader behavior.
New assumptions must be reported as missing or undischarged unless explicit evidence is present.
Non-conclusions are mandatory guardrails and cannot be dropped by migration.
Coverage and exactness metadata delimit what any reported value can support.

requiredChecks: field mapping entries are explicit for renamed or removed fields
deprecated fields declare replacement or removal behavior
new required assumptions are surfaced as missing until discharged
coverage and exactness metadata are not dropped
nonConclusions: compatibility policy is not a proof of semantic preservation
compatibility policy is not evidence of extractor completeness
compatibility policy is not a Lean theorem package
schema migration is not a semantic-preservation theorem
catalog membership does not imply extractor completeness
compatibility pass does not imply architecture lawfulness
compatibility pass does not promote tooling evidence to a Lean theorem claim
